duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in usgs earthquake activity near major ports signals short-term freight logistics disruption and bearish xli

idea.title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk
idea.thesis: Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains. Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs.
data_sources: USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports
idea.signal_logic: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events Exit: Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk.

schema.idea: Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk

data.source: USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports

schema.behavior: Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events
trade_logic.exit: Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk.

duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Battery Replacement Searches Signals Auto Repair Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency vehicle battery replacement searches signals auto stress

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Battery Replacement Searches Signals Auto Repair Stress
idea.thesis: Spike in emergency vehicle battery replacement searches indicates rising auto repair stress. Higher auto repair demand lifts industrial sector companies servicing vehicle parts and maintenance.
data_sources: Google Trends daily emergency vehicle battery replacement searches
idea.signal_logic: Enter long when daily search volume spikes 40% above 10-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long when daily search volume spikes 40% above 10-day average Exit: Exit when volume falls below 15% above 10-day average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily emergency vehicle battery replacement searches via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle battery failures spike seasonally and with cold snaps or electrical system recalls.

schema.idea: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Battery Replacement Searches Signals Auto Repair Stress

data.source: Google Trends daily emergency vehicle battery replacement searches

schema.behavior: Spike in emergency vehicle battery replacement searches indicates rising auto repair stress.

market_impact.rationale: Higher auto repair demand lifts industrial sector companies servicing vehicle parts and maintenance.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when daily search volume spikes 40% above 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when volume falls below 15% above 10-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle battery failures spike seasonally and with cold snaps or electrical system recalls.
